series_metadata.series_description: Records which document any active, pending, or potential legal cases to which OFCC is a party or which arise as a result of an OFCC project, including court records, research materials, reports, memoranda, correspondence, attorney notes, and any other attorney work product, records, or information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed, then destroy. If the case is dismissed without prejudice, retain one year after statute of limitations runs, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed, then destroy. If the case is dismissed without prejudice, retain one year after statute of limitations runs, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
